email.common.troubleClicking: If you're having trouble clicking the button, copy and paste this URL into your browser:
email.common.safeToIgnore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
email.commentNotification.body.mention: mentioned you in a comment on
email.commentNotification.footer.mention: This notification was sent because you were mentioned in a comment.
email.commentNotification.footer.owner: This notification was sent because you own this presentation.
email.commentNotification.footer.comment: This notification was sent because you commented on this presentation.
email.guestVerification.subject: Verify your email to comment on "{presTitle}"
email.guestVerification.body: Click the link below to verify your email and join the discussion on {presTitle}:
email.passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
email.passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to choose a new password:
email.passwordReset.expiry: This link expires in 1 hour. If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
email.userInvitation.subject: You've been invited to join
email.userInvitation.body: {inviter} has invited you to join. Click the button below to set up your account:
email.activationReminder.subject: Reminder: Complete your account setup
email.activationReminder.body: We noticed you haven't completed your account setup yet. {inviter} invited you to join — click the button below to get started:
email.activationReminder.expiry: This invitation link is still valid.
email.collaboratorInvite.subject: {inviter} shared "{presTitle}" with you
email.collaboratorInvite.access: You now have {accessLevel} to this presentation.
email.magicLink.subject: Your sign-in link
email.magicLink.body: Click the button below to sign in. No password needed!
email.magicLink.expiry: This link expires in 15 minutes and can only be used once.
email.magicLink.passwordHint: Prefer to use a password? You can set one up anytime from the login page using "Forgot password".
email.guestInvitation.subject: {inviter} invited you to view "{presTitle}"
email.guestInvitation.body: {inviter} has invited you to view and comment on their presentation {presTitle}.
email.guestInvitation.footer: You'll be asked to verify your email address when you access the presentation.
email.leadNotification.subject: New lead from "{presTitle}"
email.leadNotification.body: A new lead was captured from your presentation {presTitle}:
email.leadNotification.footer: You received this notification because you have lead email notifications enabled.
api.error.resetLinkExpired: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
api.error.mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to change your password
api.error.noDbCredentials: Cannot change password - no database credentials found
api.success.magicLinkSent: If your email is registered, a magic link has been sent. Check your inbox.
api.success.resetLinkSent: If an account exists with this email, a reset link has been sent.
api.success.passwordReset: Password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
